adrs.title: Polyrepo over monorepo
adrs.body:
## Context

We own seven `subagentapps/*` repositories plus one shared meta-repo. The team needs to decide whether to keep the polyrepo layout or consolidate into a single monorepo.

## Decision

Keep the polyrepo. Each plugin (`productivity-cli`, `product-management-cli`, `data-cli`, `platform-engineering`, `it-admin`, `engineering-cli`) versions independently via release-please. The meta-repo (`subagent-organizations`) holds the typed reference catalog and integration-layer specs.

Reasons:

- Plugins ship to different audiences on different cadences
- Each plugin can have its own CHANGELOG, owners, and CI without interference
- The KB layer in this repo references plugins as external sources, not in-tree code

## Consequences

- Cross-plugin breaking changes need explicit version bumps + cross-repo PR coordination
- The dashboard at this app reaches into each plugin via `/api/github-file` (see [`./0003-pages-functions-vs-direct-fetch.md`](./0003-pages-functions-vs-direct-fetch.md))
- ADR cross-links between plugins go through the meta-repo's index, not direct repo paths

## Status

Accepted 2026-04-25. Revisit if onboarding cost grows or if cross-plugin shared code reaches >30% of any plugin's surface area.

adrs.title: TypeScript reference catalog framing
adrs.body:
## Context

The `subagent-organizations` meta-repo started life as a vendoring repo with submodule-pinned upstream copies of the seven plugin repos. CLAUDE.md was reverted on 2026-04-25 to remove the vendoring framing.

## Decision

Reframe `subagent-organizations` as a **TypeScript reference catalog modeled after the Claude Agent SDK's primitive system**. No submodules. The repo holds:

- `docs/spec/` — markdown contracts under per-domain dirs (`subagentmcp-sdk/`, `cli-skills/`, `frontend/`)
- `src/` — TypeScript implementations that mirror `docs/spec/` 1:1
- `tests/` — Bun test suite asserting against the contracts
- `.claude/` — Claude Code project config (agents, skills, settings)

## Consequences

- Vendor pull-ins like the original Anthropic cookbook submodule are out — see [`./0001-polyrepo-over-monorepo.md`](./0001-polyrepo-over-monorepo.md)
- The `kb-keeper` agent now uses crawlee-based readers (see crawlee-content-layer spec) instead of vendored tools
- All `src/` files have a matching `docs/spec/` file before they land — enforced by the orchestrator's spec-first rule

## Status

Accepted 2026-04-25. CLAUDE.md #5 forbids submodules; CLAUDE.md #2 enforces spec-first.

adrs.title: Pages Functions over direct GitHub fetch
adrs.body:
## Context

The live-artifact dashboard fetches GitHub Project / Issue / file content. We can either:

1. Direct browser → GitHub fetch with a public PAT
2. Browser → Cloudflare Pages Function → GitHub with a server-side PAT

## Decision

Use Pages Functions (option 2). Each route that needs GitHub data reads from `/api/projects` (Project board) or `/api/github-file` (file content), both backed by 5-minute KV cache.

## Consequences

- The PAT lives in Cloudflare Secret Store, never in client code or the repo
- Browser load is fast: KV cache hits are <100ms; cold cache hits GitHub once per 5 minutes per slug
- Build-time `projects-snapshot.json` snapshot lets the page render before `/api/projects` resolves
- Local dev without the GITHUB_TOKEN secret falls back to the static fixture (see `content-fixture.json`)

## Status

Accepted 2026-04-26. The fallback fixture pattern in PR B of #10 is the early-stage version; PR D (`/api/projects` Pages Function) replaces it with live fetch + KV cache.

changelogs.body:
### Features

- **frontend:** scaffold `src/apps/live-artifact/` (PR #96)
- **frontend:** SPA shell + 4 stub routes + Field animation (PR #98)
- **kb:** contextual-retrieval pipeline complete: chunker, contextualizer, embedder + BM25, retriever, reranker, eval harness (PRs #81 → #86)
- **sdk:** crawlee-content-layer complete: subagent-md, subagent-xml, subagent-html, subagent-js readers + parry scan + bloom cache (PRs #66 → #72)
- **skills:** /skill-creator skill using advanced patterns (PR #74)
- **parity:** cli-parity-tracker matrix + bun parity-check (PR #73)

### Specs

- engineering-cli plugin port plan + 5 skill specs (PRs #87, #91, #92, #93)
- kb-keeper refresh routine + Anthropic jobs source (PR #95)

### Features

- Initial scaffold: release-please, conventional commits, polyrepo + subagentmcp-sdk + KB foundation (PR #3)
- Pre-implementation specs + .claude scaffolding (PR #1)
